# tenableio_folders (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of scan folders from Tenable.io.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all folders
data "tenableio_folders" "all" {}

output "folder_names" {
  value = [for f in data.tenableio_folders.all.folders : f.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `folders` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--folders))

<a id="nestedatt--folders"></a>
### Nested Schema for `folders`

Read-Only:

- `custom` (Number)
- `id` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `type` (String)
